location.selection_reason: Repeated starvation failures in the prior overnight run occurred near this terrain location.

interpretation: The location and food distribution were viable. Continuous critical-hunger MPC suppressed recurrent exploration when no target was visible. Allowing recurrent exploration without a visible target and engaging short stochastic MPC only for grounded targets or obstacles reproduced normal foraging in this controlled run.
limits: This is a targeted three-minute engineering diagnostic, not an independent long-duration or randomized validation.
